pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly query for m_product WHERE name='Spade' to determine the SPADE_ID.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly query for m_product WHERE name='Hoe' to determine the HOE_ID.
Task description instructs setting name to 'Alternative for Spring', and verifier.py requires record_name to contain this exact string.
Task description instructs setting description to 'Suggest when Spade is out of stock', and verifier.py explicitly requires record_description to contain 'out of stock'.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for idempiere_env configure_product_substitute task by confirming that the task operates on the synthetic iDempiere GardenWorld demo data. Verified that the expected parent product ('Spade'), substitute product ('Hoe'), substitute record name ('Alternative for Spring'), and description substring ('out of stock') exactly match the task description instructions, the setup/export shell script PostgreSQL queries, and the verifier.py logic.
